title: Merry Adventure 2
description: Merry Adventure 2 invites players into a journey filled with endless discoveries!
body:
![Merry Adventure Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce62437793212970a7e38ddd3da6456c6b3cc3f.png)
Merry Adventure 2 takes you into a challenging world with added survival elements, exciting exploration, and new gameplay possibilities. Experience Minecraft with fresh mechanics and adventures!

## **Enhanced Survival Mechanics**
Survival in Merry Adventure 2 goes beyond hunger. Along with the thirst system, your character is now affected by temperature. Beware of overheating in hot areas and freezing in cold climates! Stay hydrated, manage your env ironment, and prepare wisely to endure various conditions and make it through tough environments.

## **Unique Origins and Abilities**
At the start of your journey, choose your character's origin and unlock unique abilities and traits. Each origin offers specific strengths and weaknesses, adding diversity to your playstyle and shaping how you face challenges. Customize your path and explore different ways to survive and thrive.

## **Build a Public Transport Network**
Construct a public transport system to make travel easier for yourself and others. Strategically build pathways, rail networks, Ports or Airports points to connect distant areas across the world.

## **A World Full of Adventures**
Enter a richly detailed world packed with new dungeons and mysterious structures. Seek out hidden treasures, encounter powerful foes, and explore ancient ruins, massive fortresses, and other secrets around every corner.


### **_Modpack Created by_**

![Logo of the Organization which Created The Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe8aa6e664c382dc78780aa911357e0215a6c30f.png)
